title: cynometra martiana var. procera
intro: Cynometra martiana var. procera, also known as the 'Gamboge tree', is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its yellow sap and medicinal properties. The sap of the Cynometra martiana var. procera tree contains a compound called gamboge, which has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of the plant have been linked to various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Cynometra martiana var. procera include the use of its sap in traditional medicine, as well as in modern herbal remedies, often in the form of capsules or extracts.
